title: synmeria crinifera
intro: Synmeria crinifera, also known as the bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to North America with small white or pink flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of arbutin and hydroquinone. The health benefits of Synmeria crinifera include its ability to help alleviate urinary tract issues, such as incontinence and cystitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Synmeria crinifera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote urinary health and overall well-being.
